_meta.purpose: Ground-truth exceptions list: hardware variants that share ONE AsteroidOS system image (and thus one machine.conf MACHINE= name). a-d-b shows the exact hardware codename in the UI (matching asteroidos.org), resolving it from whatever attributes it can currently read; the MACHINE image is what actually gets flashed. Purely cosmetic — behind the scenes the MACHINE name is authoritative. See docs/ADDING-A-WATCH.md.
_meta.note: Every variant's distinguishing factors are recorded as ground truth even when a-d-b cannot yet read them (LTE is unsupported by AsteroidOS entirely; GPS/RAM/case size have no detector yet). When a detector is added, add its factor to variants.DETECTABLE and this table applies with no re-survey. Variants are ORDERED base-first; the resolver returns the first whose detectable factors match, else the base.

variants._note: resolution mo-stated 2026-07-17, not yet confirmed live from fb0/modes
same panel as belugaxl; LTE is not detectable, so a 402x476 OPPO shows as belugaxl until LTE detection exists
device DB shows a ~5px height delta (smelt 360x330 vs carp 360x325); unconfirmed as a reliable signal, so treated as case/dpi only for now
